anatomy.description: Semi-transparent full-screen backdrop. Blocks interaction with content behind the dialog.
Rounded container that holds all dialog content. Anchored or centered depending on type.
Contains the dialog title and an optional close icon.
Scrollable region for forms, fields, instructions, or structured content.
Action row at the bottom of the panel. Holds one or two buttons.

variants.name: Compact
variants.description: Partial-screen panel. Use for short forms, single-field inputs, and tasks that fit in limited vertical space.

variants.name: Full page
variants.description: Full or near-full-screen panel. Use for longer forms, multi-step flows, and tasks requiring more vertical space.

sizes.name: TODO
sizes.note: TODO: Confirm whether fixed size values are defined per type, or whether dimensions are content-driven.

states.name: Open
states.description: Dialog panel and overlay are mounted and visible.

states.name: Closed
states.description: Dialog panel and overlay are unmounted or hidden.

actions.primaryAction: Completes the task. Example: Save, Apply, Confirm.
actions.secondaryAction: Dismisses or cancels. Example: Cancel, Go back.
actions.note: Never add more than two actions. Always provide a way to dismiss.

dismissBehavior.overlayTap: TODO: Confirm whether tapping the overlay dismisses the dialog.
dismissBehavior.cancelButton: Recommended. Always provide a dismiss path for reversible tasks.

relatedComponents.name: Button
relatedComponents.when: Action buttons in the dialog footer follow the Button component spec.

relatedComponents.name: Snackbar
relatedComponents.when: Lightweight recoverable issues with quick actions (Undo / Retry).

notes: Figma variants are named 'Type=Compact' and 'Type=Full page'.
